---

## Overview

> CNN-based medical imaging system for early Alzheimer's diagnosis.

**Alzheimers AI Detection** is an advanced machine learning / ai system engineered by **Karthik Idikuda**. 

<br/>

## System Architecture

```mermaid
graph TD;
    A["Raw Data Input"] -->|"Ingest"| B["Preprocessing Pipeline"];
    B -->|"Clean Tensors"| D{"Neural Net Engine"};
    D -->|"Training Loop"| E["Inference & Prediction"];
    E -->|"Metrics"| F["Evaluation & Output"];

    style A fill:#0f2027,stroke:#00e5ff,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
    style B fill:#203a43,stroke:#00e5ff,stroke-width:1px,color:#fff
    style D fill:#0f2027,stroke:#00e5ff,stroke-width:3px,color:#fff
    style E fill:#203a43,stroke:#00e5ff,stroke-width:1px,color:#fff
    style F fill:#2c5364,stroke:#00e5ff,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
```

<br/>

## Project Structure

```
Alzheimers-AI-Detection/
  .gitignore
  AI4Alzheimer's Hackathon.docx
  Datasets-20251218T080510Z-3-001.zip
  Datasets-20251218T080658Z-3-001.zip
  Hack4Health AI for Alzheimer's Challenge_ Competition Packet .docx
  LICENSE
  README.md
  Datasets/
  Datasets 2/
  alzheimer_project/
    AI4Alzheimers_Notebook.ipynb
    AI4Alzheimers_Report.md
    NeuroXAI_Advanced_Technical_Report.pdf
    NeuroXAI_Colab_Advanced.ipynb
```

<br/>
